title: Amtech S0545 45cm x 125cm Non-slip grip mats
features: STRONG GRIP: These non-slip mats will grip almost any surface and not move once positioned
MULTI-PURPOSE: Provided in the size 45cm x 125cm, they can be cut to size and are ideal for tool boxes, chests and cabinets as drawer liners to stop movement and protect tools
WASHABLE AND RESISTANT: The mats are washable and also mould and mildew resistant
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: From the manufacturer Amtech S0545 Non-Slip Mat, 45 x 125 cm Multi-purpose non-slip mat will grip and protect almost any surface Mat will not move once positioned Washable and can be cut to size Mould and mildew resistant Approx dimensions 45 x 125cm Ideal for tool boxes, chests and cabinets as drawer liners, stops movement and protects tools About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
